title: platform-user — feature keys
description: Feature keys exposed on the platform_admin plane. NOT tenant-facing features (those live per-tenant + are surfaced via `GET /api/auth/me→data.features`). These features gate platform-admin UI surfaces + drive the sidebar rendering of the ops dashboard.

reference.consumed_by: the platform-admin SPA + internal tooling that mounts based on caller capability

features.description: Enables the `Hire staff` action in the platform-admin UI. Gated by the `platform.platform_users.hire` permission at server-side.
Enables the `Offboard` action + the offboarding dashboard.
Enables the suspension workflow. Distinct from offboard — suspend is temporary.
Enables the per-staffer audit-trail dashboard + PDF export. Gated by `platform.platform_users.view.audit_trail` server-side.
Enables the on-call rotation viewer + the escalation-path resolver in the ops dashboard.
Off unless PagerDuty API key is configured. Surfaces the schedule-authoring links in the ops dashboard.
Enables the `Impersonate as this tenant user` action. Requires the caller to hold the `platform.impersonate` entitlement (per-PlatformUser flag, not a role).
Enables the manager-hierarchy visualisation in the ops dashboard.
